etn 3.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Explore acoustic telemetry data
    • Configure credentials
    • Options
  • Changelog

List all available receiver ids

Source: R/list_receiver_ids.R
list_receiver_ids.Rd

List all available receiver ids

Usage

list_receiver_ids(connection)

Arguments

connection

A connection to the ETN database. This argument is no longer used. You will be prompted for credentials instead.

Value

A vector of all unique receiver present in acoustic.receivers.

Examples

list_receiver_ids()
#>    [1] "ADTT-3"                                                
#>    [2] "ADTT-4"                                                
#>    [3] "ASCENT-AR-580023"                                      
#>    [4] "ASCENT-AR-580025"                                      
#>    [5] "ASCENT-AR-580027"                                      
#>    [6] "ASCENT-AR-580109"                                      
#>    [7] "BATTERY PACK-151"                                      
#>    [8] "BATTERY PACK-159"                                      
#>    [9] "BATTERY-153"                                           
#>   [10] "BENTHIC POD-Benthic Pod-88"                            
#>   [11] "BENTHIC POD-Benthic pod-91"
